title: Workpack Memory Entry
description: Schema for knowledge base entries extracted from completed workpack retrospectives. Each entry captures reusable lessons, patterns, and anti-patterns discovered during workpack execution.

entry_id.description: Unique identifier for this memory entry (e.g. MEM-001).

source_workpack.description: ID of the workpack that produced this lesson.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this entry was created.

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary of the lesson.

detail.description: Extended description with context and rationale.

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and discovery.

impact.description: Severity or importance of the lesson.

recommendation.description: Actionable recommendation derived from the lesson.

related_prompts.description: Prompt stems from the source workpack relevant to this lesson.

supersedes.description: Entry ID that this lesson replaces or updates.
